caption: The video features an older man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a patterned blue shirt adorned with eagle motifs and a beaded necklace. He is standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal setting, possibly a conference or seminar. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The man gestures with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is engaged in delivering a speech or presentation. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting that the event may be related to this organization. The audience members, partially visible in the foreground, seem attentive to his words.
